positive: Minimalist geometric style illustration of a soaring griffin, depicted in a highly stylized, detailed silhouette against a vibrant, cosmic nebula background. The griffin has elegant, sweeping lines, its body forming a clear, powerful central motif. Composition should be centered and symmetrical for optimal apparel placement. Use deep indigo, electric cyan, and glowing gold accents for the nebula and outline, maintaining extreme contrast with the solid black silhouette of the creature. Clean line art, vector quality, perfect for screen printing. Trending on ArtStation, highly detailed, high contrast, flat design elements.
negative: artifacts, low quality, blur, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, grain, fuzzy, messy, gradient, 3d render, photograph, depth of field
